spec.title: Circuit Breaker
spec.description: Shows if circuit breaker has been triggered (503 errors on POST)

spec.title: API Replicas
spec.description: Number of healthy API service replicas running (target: 3)

spec.title: Worker Replicas
spec.description: Number of healthy worker service replicas running (target: 5)

spec.title: POST Availability Trend
spec.description: Transaction submission availability over time with 99.5% SLO target

spec.title: GET Availability Trend
spec.description: Inquiry availability over time with 99% SLO target

spec.title: Error Rate
spec.description: Rate of 503 (circuit breaker) and 404 (not found) errors

spec.title: API Service Resource Usage
spec.description: CPU usage per API container instance

spec.title: API Service Memory
spec.description: Memory usage per API container instance

spec.title: Worker Service Resource Usage
spec.description: CPU usage per worker container instance

spec.title: Worker Service Memory
spec.description: Memory usage per worker container instance

spec.title: Request Rate (RPS)
spec.description: Requests per second by method (POST = transaction submit, GET = inquiry)

spec.title: Total Requests Served
spec.description: Lifetime count of requests handled by the system
